_source.text:
確的？ 
A. 沒有貨幣，利息不會存在。 
B. 沒有通脹，利息不會存在。 
C. 沒有稀少性，利息不會存在。 
D. 利息是對借款人延遲消費的補償。
Type 5 (The Three Basic Economic Problem)
Example Question 1 CE1995MCQ20
The Housing Authority is considering whether it should raise the income limits of families for the application of public housing. What basic economic problem(s) is/are involved in this consideration?
A. What to produce?B. How to produce?
C. For whom to produce?D. What and for whom to produce?
房屋委員會正考慮是否將公共房屋申請人的家庭入息限 額提高。這考慮牽涉到什麼基本經濟問題？
A. 生產什麼？B. 如何生產？
C. 為誰生產？D. 生產什麼及為誰生產？
Example Question 2 CE2006MCQ1
Since the opening of Hong Kong Disneyland, some people have suggested a reduction of the ticket price. This suggestion is related to the ____________ question(s) in Economics.
A. ‘what to produce’ B. ‘how to produce’
C. ‘for whom to produce’ D. ‘what, how and for whom to produce’
香港迪士尼樂園開幕後，有人建議減低票價。該建議於經濟學上的 ____________ 問題有關。
A. 生產什麼B. 怎樣生產
C. 為誰生產D. 生產什麼、怎樣生產和為誰生產
Example Question 3 DSE2017MCQ1
The operator of a canteen in the government headquarters decides to

canteen in the government headquarters decides to sell sushi and not burgers anymore because the former can earn a higher profit. This an example of using _____ to solve the problem of _____.
A. Government command … ‘what to produce’B. Government command … ‘for whom to produce’
C. Market mechanism … ‘what to produce’D. Market mechanism … ‘for whom to produce’
政府總部某間食堂的營運商決定售賣壽司而不再售賣漢堡包，因為前者能賺獲更高利潤。這是以 _____ 去解決 _____ 的問題的一個例子。
A. 政府指令 … 「生產什麼」B. 政府指令 … 「為誰生產」
C. 市場機制 … 「生產什麼」D. 市場機制 … 「為誰生產」
Example Question 4 DSE2018MCQ2
The Chief Executive proposed to raise the recurrent education spending $5 billion. One of her proposals was to provide a $30000 subsidy to eligible secondary school graduates studying self-financing programmes. The above proposal is related to the _____ question(s) in Economics.
A. ‘how to produce’B. ‘for whom to produce’
C. ‘what to produce’ and ‘how to produce’D. ‘what to produce’ and ‘for whom to produce’
行政長官提議增加50億元教育經常開支。其中一項提案是向修讀自資課程的合資格中學畢業生提供30,000元的補貼。以上提案與經濟學中 _________ 的問題有關。
A

下圖顯示一條生產鏈。
上述生產鏈對香港本地生產總值的貢獻是
A. $1400 B. $1700 C. $2400 D. $2600 
Example Question 5 CE2007MCQ28
Answer the following questions by referring to the following production chain of watches in an economy. The local watch manufacturers import $10000 worth of raw materials.
What is the contribution of the above producing chain to the economy's GDP at market prices? 
A. $105 000 B. $110 000 C. $115 000 D. $120 000
Example Question 6 CE2007MCQ29
What is the contribution of the local watch retailers to the economy's GDP at factor cost? 
A. $25 000 B. $30 000 C. $75 000 D. $80 000
參照下圖某經濟的鐘錶生產鏈回答第5及6題。該經濟的鐘錶製造商進口價值$10 000的原料。
上述生產鏈對該經濟以市價 計算的本地生產總值的貢獻是_____。
A. $105 000 B. $110 000 C. $115 000 D. $120 000
本地鐘錶零售商對該經濟以生產要素成本計算的本地生產總值的貢獻是_____。
A. $25 000 B. $30 000 C. $75 000 D. $80 000

What is the contribution of the above production ch
